requirement: Fix top CX gaps across admin-ui: (1) Fix hardcoded localhost in config.ts WebSocket URL, (2) Add ErrorBoundary wrapper to DashboardLayout, (3) Wire loading={isLoading} to all DataGrid instances + add toast feedback to all mutation actions, (4) Improve DataGrid empty state with centered icon+message design, (5) Add basic responsive CSS for mobile 375px and tablet 768px to admin-ui layout and DataGrid

tasks.title: Fix hardcoded localhost in admin-ui WebSocket URL
tasks.description: In src/admin-ui/src/config.ts line 16, replace the hardcoded 'ws://localhost:8080/api/v1/ws' with a dynamic URL that derives the WebSocket URL from the current window.location. Use the pattern: const protocol = window.location.protocol === 'https:' ? 'wss:' : 'ws:'; then `${protocol}//${window.location.host}/api/v1/ws`. The web-ui SPA already does this correctly in Trading.tsx — follow that pattern. Keep the runtime config override (__GARUDAX_CONFIG__) working.

tasks.title: Add ErrorBoundary to DashboardLayout
tasks.description: Create a reusable ErrorBoundary component at src/admin-ui/src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx (React class component with componentDidCatch). Show a centered card with an error icon, 'Something went wrong' title, and a 'Reload page' button. Use CSS Modules (ErrorBoundary.module.css) following existing project patterns. Log the error to console. The retry button should call window.location.reload(). Then wrap the <Outlet /> in DashboardLayout.tsx (line 35) with this ErrorBoundary.

tasks.title: Wire loading + toast feedback to all admin pages
tasks.description:
Two changes across all admin page files:

A) Wire loading={isLoading} to DataGrid: Every page using usePolling already gets isLoading from the hook but none pass it to DataGrid. Destructure isLoading from every usePolling call and pass loading={isLoading} to every <DataGrid> component.

Pages: Participants, CircuitBreakers, Surveillance, ComplianceAlerts, AuditLog, Tickets, FeeManagement (already has isLoading), MarketPhase, OrderBook (3 polls), Positions (3 polls), MarginCalls (2 polls), RiskOverview (3 polls), SettlementStatus, WarehouseOverview (3 polls), SystemMonitoring. For DashboardHome (4 polls using cards not DataGrid), show Skeleton component while loading.

B) Add toast feedback to mutations: Import useToast from '../contexts/ToastContext' in every page with mutation actions. Wrap actions in try/catch: try { await action(); showToast('Success message', 'success'); refresh(); } catch (err) { showToast(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Action failed', 'error'); }

Pages with mutations: Participants (approve/reject), CircuitBreakers (halt/resume/edit), Surveillance (resolve), ComplianceAlerts (actions), FeeManagement (save/delete), Tickets (status update), MarketPhase (phase change), MarginCalls (issue/resolve), Reports (export).

tasks.title: Improve DataGrid empty state design
tasks.description:
Improve the DataGrid empty state from plain text to a visually appealing centered design with an icon.

In src/admin-ui/src/components/DataGrid.tsx:
- Replace the current empty state (lines 200-205, plain td with text) with a centered container
- Add an InboxIcon SVG to src/admin-ui/src/components/icons.tsx (simple empty inbox/folder icon)
- The empty state should show: icon (32px, muted color) + emptyMessage text below in muted color
- Center everything horizontally and vertically with 48px top/bottom padding
- Keep the existing emptyMessage prop working

In src/admin-ui/src/components/DataGrid.module.css:
- Add .emptyContainer with flexbox centering, column direction
- Add .emptyIcon for icon sizing and color
- Add .emptyText for muted text styling
- Use existing color patterns from other .module.css files (check StatusBadge.module.css or Toast.module.css for color conventions)

tasks.title: Add responsive CSS to admin-ui layout
tasks.description:
Add responsive CSS using @media queries to make the admin-ui usable on mobile (375px) and tablet (768px).

Files to modify:

1. src/admin-ui/src/pages/DashboardLayout.module.css: On mobile (<768px) collapse sidebar to narrow icon-only mode. Main content takes full width. Reduce content padding.

2. src/admin-ui/src/components/DataGrid.module.css: On mobile (<768px) make table horizontally scrollable (overflow-x: auto on .wrapper). Reduce cell padding. Font-size reduction for .td and .th.

3. src/admin-ui/src/components/Sidebar.module.css + Sidebar.tsx: On mobile (<768px) hide text labels, show only icons. Width collapses from ~220px to ~56px. Consider adding a mobile toggle button.

4. src/admin-ui/src/components/TopBar.module.css: On mobile: reduce padding, hide less-important elements.

Breakpoints: 768px (tablet), 480px (small mobile). Don't break existing desktop layout. Ensure no horizontal overflow on 375px viewport.

tasks.title: CX review: admin-ui CX polish
tasks.description:
Review all CX changes from T1-T5 against the CX checklist. Score each of the 10 items as pass/fail. Fix any gaps directly. Target: CX score >= 7/10.

Verify:
1. Config.ts no longer has hardcoded localhost
2. ErrorBoundary renders user-friendly fallback
3. All DataGrid instances show skeleton while loading
4. All mutation actions show toast feedback
5. Empty state has visual icon+message design
6. Layout works at 375px, 768px, 1280px
7. No 'undefined', 'NaN', or raw JSON visible
8. All new components use project CSS conventions
9. ErrorBoundary retry button is keyboard-accessible
10. Toast messages are clear and actionable
